expectations.text: Installs Ruby via rbenv/asdf/mise â€” does NOT recommend system Ruby
expectations.evidence: Recommends `brew install ruby@3.4` which installs Homebrew Ruby (system-level), not rbenv/asdf/mise version manager

expectations.text: Gemfile includes a docs-appropriate theme (e.g., just-the-docs) that supports sidebar nav and light/dark
expectations.evidence: No theme gem included â€” uses custom layouts with manual CSS/JS for light/dark mode
No `theme:` set in _config.yml â€” relies on custom layouts

expectations.text: Workflow gives `actions/configure-pages` step an `id: pages` so `steps.pages.outputs.base_path` resolves
Workflow sets `JEKYLL_ENV=production` on the build step
Workflow has an htmlproofer step that runs against `_site` and fails on broken internal links
expectations.evidence: `bundle exec htmlproofer ./_site` with flags, and explanation of non-zero exit

expectations.text: htmlproofer step is scoped to internal links (e.g., `--disable-external`) to keep PR checks fast and stable
expectations.evidence: Does not use `--disable-external`. Uses `--only-4xx` which still checks external URLs returning 4xx

expectations.text: Uses current major versions: actions/checkout@v4, ruby/setup-ruby@v1, actions/configure-pages@v5, actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3, actions/deploy-pages@v4
Build step passes `--baseurl` from `${{ steps.pages.outputs.base_path }}` (or equivalent)
